## Thesis / aim

**Reason** **to** **Resist** **interview** **threads** **Iran** **escalation** (**Keane** **clip**), **Jiang**’s **read** **of** **sustained** **air** **campaign** **vs** **regime** **resilience**, **Hormuz** **as** **global** **economic** **“nuclear** **option”**, **NSS**-style **strangulation** **of** **China** **via** **Iran** **and** **first-island-chain** **pressure**; **China** **support** **for** **Iran** **short** **of** **war**; **Carney** **Davos** **(Thucydides** **/** **Havel** **frames)** **and** **skepticism** **on** **values-based** **realism**; **Canada–China** **EV** **/** **canola** **deal** **as** **financial** **/** **household-savings** **story** (**BIS** **/** **central-bank** **coordination** **hypothesis**); **Huawei** **/** **Meng** **legacy** **and** **interference** **narrative** **critique**.

## Defined terms (speaker usage)

- **Escalation ladder** — **Retaliation** **path** **before** **Hormuz** **closure**; **WWIII** **framing** **if** **strait** **shut**.
- **Values-based realism** — **Carney** **/** **Stubb** **label** **after** **“rules-based** **order”** **as** **partial** **fiction**.

## Claims (numbered)

1. **US** **will** **strike** **Iran** **(air)**; **2026** **as** **ongoing** **US–Iran** **background** **unless** **ground** **troops** **change** **outcomes**.
2. **First-term** **Trump** **Iran** **arc** **(JCPOA**, **Jerusalem**, **Abraham** **Accords**, **Soleimani)** **continues** **toward** **regime-change** **pressure**.
3. **Hormuz** **closure** **→** **Northeast** **/** **Southeast** **Asian** **economic** **shock** **and** **forced** **military** **response** **(China** **/** **Japan)**.
4. **China** **bolsters** **Iran** **(systems** **/** **finance)** **;** **no** **PLA** **ground** **war** **on** **US**; **Russia** **naval** **attrition** **/** **financing** **hypothesis**.
5. **Carney** **speech** **as** **Thucydides** **(Delian** **League** **→** **Sparta** **=** **China)** **and** **Havel** **irony**; **Canada** **“toxic** **asset”** **/** **election** **/** **asset-strip** **prediction**.
6. **Canada–China** **commodities** **and** **EV** **quota** **as** **breakthrough** **toward** **deeper** **ties**; **Trump** **April** **Beijing** **parallel** **deal** **speculation**.
7. **BIS** **as** **venue** **for** **central-bank** **alignment** **before** **Xi–Carney** **signing** **(hypothesis)**.
8. **Huawei** **hostility** **tied** **to** **Meng** **/** **two** **Michaels** **legacy**; **le** **Carré** **frame** **on** **intel** **threat** **manufacture**.

## Internal tensions (if any)

- **Satirical** **“worship** **Trump”** **Canada** **advice** **vs** **analytic** **claims** **—** **tone** **layer** **distinct** **from** **forecast** **layer**.
- **BIS** **/** **Ponzi** **/** **money-laundering** **claims** **are** **strong** **—** **tag** **as** **hypothesis** **in** **book** **lane**.
